name: Headquarters Bar & Restaurant
about: Headquarters Bar & Restaurant is a family-friendly sports-themed venue in Oregon, WI, featuring two indoor golf simulators alongside its full bar and restaurant operations. The facility offers 32 beers on tap, a classic American menu, and a large outdoor patio, making it a multi-purpose destination for dining and recreation. The Garage @HQ, an adult lounge connected to the main venue, houses two Golfzon simulators alongside other entertainment options like pinball and foosball. Reservations for the golf garage include a private bar, staff, and simulator access with some clubs provided.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient all-in-one venue with golf, food, and drinks
Two Golfzon simulators in a dedicated adult lounge space
Option for private reservations with dedicated bar and staff
Part of a larger sports-themed entertainment complex

food_and_drink.notes: Classic American bar fare including burgers, wings, mac bowls
32 beers on tap, premium cocktails in the adult lounge

simulator_hardware.notes: Two simulators located in The Garage @HQ adult lounge

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, some clubs are provided with your reservation. However, you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring in my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as the venue offers its own full bar and restaurant menu.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Reservations are typically booked in 3-hour blocks, which should provide ample time to play a full round or multiple rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Headquarters Bar & Restaurant is described as a family-friendly venue, though The Garage @HOQ adult lounge is restricted to ages 21+.
